name: Rollback Failure — Invalid Image Manifest
failure_mode: New container image manifest is invalid or registry auth fails. Rollback to stable revision also fails due to stale image pull secret.
detection: Container restart loop in ACA. All gates fail due to service unavailability.
remediation: 1. Verify image exists in ACR. 2. Check MI has AcrPull role on registry. 3. Force revision redeployment with known-good image tag. 4. Re-run all gates after recovery.
